Ticker Comments Sentiment

Audio Commands (Voice Control)

  • Say "Hello" - Shows alert "Hello World"
  • Say "Change the color to blue/red/etc" - Changes background
  • Say "Navigate to home/stocks/dogs" - Opens that page
  • Say "Lookup MSFT" - Looks up MSFT stock data for 30 days
